Background.occupation: Customer Service Representative at a mid-sized insurance company
Background.social_class: Working class / Lower income, with an annual household income of approximately $38,000
Background.key_experience: Grew up in a tight-knit, low-income neighborhood where community support was essential; witnessed parents struggle with job instability, which instilled a strong work ethic and desire for stability but limited career advancement opportunities.

Cognition.bias: Just-world hypothesis bias—tends to assume that people generally get what they deserve, which sometimes leads to underestimating systemic barriers faced by others in similar situations.
